member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.TestMethodsExtension.IExtendableTestMethod`2
member.summary: The base interface for making Prime Test Method extendable Prime developer will inherit this interface to make his TM extendable with ITME.
member.typeparam: The type of the Test Method extension as defined in the concrete Test Method.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.TestMethodsExtension.IExtendableTestMethod`2.TestMethodExtension
member.summary: Gets or sets the Test Method extension object.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.TestMethodsExtension.IExtendableTestMethodBase
member.summary: The base interface for making Prime Test Method extendable.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Telemetry.TelemetryPerformanceScopes
member.summary: Logger performance scopes.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Telemetry.TelemetryPerformanceScopes.GetPerformanceScope(MPE.MIT.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Get testMethodBase execute performance scope.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestInstanceResults
member.summary: Allows proper user modification of exit port.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestInstanceResults.ExitPort
member.summary: Gets or sets outgoing exit port.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase
member.summary: The base class for Any Test Method.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.testMethodsParametersInfo
member.summary: using static here because the object is initialized during load when SharedStorage is not available. Once it is initialized we only read from it.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.OnPreExecute
member.summary: This event is being raised at pre-execute

member.name: E:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.OnPostExecute
member.summary: This event is being raised at post-execute

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.InstanceSummaryStatus
member.summary: Enable or disable Instance summary profiling feature.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.InstanceSummaryStatus.Disabled
member.summary: Disables the current instance timing and memory instance summary profiling.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.InstanceSummaryStatus.Enabled
member.summary: Turns on the current instance timing and memory instance summary profiling.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.PrimeTelemetryLogLevel
member.summary: Telemetry log level.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.PrimeTelemetryLogLevel.None
member.summary: Not used for writing log messages. Specifies that a logging category should not write any messages.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.PrimeTelemetryLogLevel.Debug
member.summary: Logs that contain the most detailed messages. These messages may contain sensitive application data. These messages are disabled by default and should never be enabled in a production environment.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.PrimeTelemetryLogLevel.Information
member.summary: Logs that track the general flow of the application. These logs should have long-term value.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.PrimeTelemetryLogLevel.Critical
member.summary: Logs that describe an unrecoverable application or system crash, or a catastrophic failure that requires immediate attention.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.PrimeLogLevel
member.summary: The log level to print to messages to the console.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.PrimeLogLevel.Disabled
member.summary: No debug messages will be printed.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.PrimeLogLevel.Enabled
member.summary: Every debug message will be printed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.DutId
member.summary: Gets the current instance's dutId.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.IpId
member.summary: Gets the current instance's ipId.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.IpName
member.summary: Gets the current instance's ipName.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.InstanceName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the current instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.TestMethodName
member.summary: Gets the test method name of the current instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets the session context of this instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.BypassPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the instance's parameter Bypass port value in case this instance is being bypassed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.LogLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets The console log level of the debug messages to be printed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.InstanceSummaryMode
member.summary: Gets or sets instance summary mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.TelemetryLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the Performance telemetry level.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.InstanceLogger
member.summary: Gets the current instance context logger.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.Prime#Kernel#ITestMethod#SetInstanceParameters(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Set the instance parameter.
member.param: pairs of parameter name and value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.Verify
member.summary: Verify function of the Test Method Usually will be called once per instance unless some parameter were changed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.CustomVerify
member.summary: This will be executed right after the Test Method Verify function passed User doing ITME can override this function to verify his instance instanceParameters.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.CustomBypass
member.summary: This will be executed before the execute of the test method (also before pre-execute event if exist). User doing ITME can override this function to decide whether to bypass this instance execution.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.ForceReVerify
member.summary: This will give each test method the option to force it's own verify. According to the methodology implementation, user can decide what are the conditions in which the test method should be force verified and in these cases return true from this API.
member.returns: Should or should not the test method be force verified.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.Execute
member.summary: The instance execution itself To be executed per die.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.Load
member.summary: This will be executed right after the Test Method object is created in loading.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.Unload
member.summary: Will be called by the kernel just before the instance is going to unloaded. This will allow the TM to make last minute cleanups if needed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.Prime#Kernel#ITestMethod#PopulateTestMethodExtension
member.summary: This function is responsible to handle and populate the ITME user extension. It will be execute at pre-verify of the instance to initialize the internal extension object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.InitMef
member.summary: Implementation of IMefAble interface.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.ValidateExtensionObjectCorrectness(Prime.Kernel.TestMethodsExtension.IExtendableTestMethodBase)
member.summary: Validate the extension object is valid and implement the interface of the expected extension type.
member.param: The extendable instance itself as IExtendableTestMethodBase.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBaseSharedStorage
member.summary: Common storage for all kernel instances to manage the loaded AppDomains and instances.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBaseSharedStorage.TestMethodTelemetryConsumer
member.summary: Gets the global logger. This is the logger framework object that will open the output stream, and handle any telemetry produced by Prime code.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBaseSharedStorage.CreateTestMethodTelemetryConsumer(MPE.MIT.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Create the test method telemetry consumer (part of the logger framework).
member.param: The telemetry global logger from the kernel.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodParametersInfo
member.summary: The parameters info at the TestMethod level - initialize once per TestMethod for all it instances.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodParametersInfo.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.Reflection.MethodInfo}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: per parameter, its type and it set method.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodParametersInfo.CommonParameters
member.summary: Gets the common parameters for this TM - resolved with the first Verify of the first instance of this TM type. CommonParamType --> [ParameterName -> (ParameterType, SetMethod)].

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodParametersInfo.TestMethodParameters
member.summary: Gets the parameters for this TM - resolved during load time. ParameterName -> (ParameterType, SetMethod).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodParametersInfo.ResolveCommonParameters(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Resolve the common parameters for this Test Method using the actual TOS parameters of the first instance.
member.param: the parameters with their value from TOS.
member.returns: list of the common parameters being used by this instance.
